name: Logitech G PRO X SUPERLIGHT 2
shortDescription: Ultra-light esports mouse with HERO 2 sensor and LIGHTSPEED wireless.
description: The Logitech G PRO X SUPERLIGHT 2 is an esports-focused wireless mouse with a lightweight shell, HERO 2 sensor, and pro-level low-latency performance.

comments.name: Petar
comments.text: Very light and precise for FPS games.

comments.name: Nina
comments.text: Battery life and wireless stability are excellent.
